args:
set -eu
trace_dir=$(mktemp -d)
trace_path="$trace_dir/bundle-tamper.trace.fozzy"
fozzy run tests/verify.fail_closed.fozzy.json --det --record "$trace_path" --json >/dev/null
fozzy shrink "$trace_path" --json | jq -e '.outTrace and .summary.mode == "run"' >/dev/null
printf 'shrink-bundle-tamper-verify\n'
